summary: Define the fixed controller/subagent boundary for Python governance runs.
rules: The controller may discover targets, launch tmux-guarded codex workers, poll progress, verify outputs, commit-and-push, mirror sync, and close sessions.
A single worker may only edit Skills/<target_skill> and must emit result.json plus result.md under its runtime directory.
Workers may not edit ~/.codex/skills, Skills/.system, Skills/_shared, or any sibling skill directories.
Workers may not run Git commit, push, or mirror sync; those operations are controller-owned closeout steps.
All temporary files must stay inside Codex_Skill_Runtime/SkillsManager-Python-SubAgentGov/<target_skill>/tmp.
